text:
C0200_WORD_RPET_FIRST_ATMPT_CD C0200 BIMS: Number of Words Repeated After First Attempt CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the number of words that the resident repeated after the first attempt. - =Not assessed/no information
 0 =None
 1=One
 2=Two
 3= Three
^=Blank(skip pattern)
96 C0300A_RPT_CRCT_YR_CD C0300A_RPT_CRCT_YR_CD C0300A BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Year CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how closely the resident knew the current year. -=Not
